result.stdout:
Description:
  StrykerRunner - Run Stryker mutation testing across multiple projects and generate unified reports

Usage:
  StrykerRunner [options]

Options:
  --test-project <test-project>          Path to the test project .csproj file. If not provided, searches for a .csproj in the current directory. []
  --output <output>                      Base output directory for Stryker reports. [default: ./StrykerOutput]
  --report-name <report-name>            Name of the unified HTML report file. [default: UnifiedMutationReport.html]
  --exclude-patterns <exclude-patterns>  Regex patterns to exclude projects (in addition to test projects). Can be specified multiple times. [default: \.Init$|\.CommunicatieModels$|\.Reqnroll$]
  --version                              Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                         Show help and usage information
